body:
## What's Changed
* Croatian and romanian translations by @zstanecic in https://github.com/RHVoice/RHVoice/pull/1032
* Romanian - ro - part 1. by @zstanecic in https://github.com/RHVoice/RHVoice/pull/1033
* Romanian- emoji script and emoji support by @zstanecic in https://github.com/RHVoice/RHVoice/pull/1034
* Romanian - final preparation by @zstanecic in https://github.com/RHVoice/RHVoice/pull/1035
* New nsis languages  support by @zstanecic in https://github.com/RHVoice/RHVoice/pull/1036
* Improve Fastlane metadata description by @yurtpage in https://github.com/RHVoice/RHVoice/pull/944
* Bump actions/upload-artifact from 5 to 7 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/RHVoice/RHVoice/pull/1030
* Installers: Msi installer for romanian by @zstanecic in https://github.com/RHVoice/RHVoice/pull/1037
* Fix speech-dispatcher CMake rules by @CyberTailor in https://github.com/RHVoice/RHVoice/pull/848
* Spanish 1.41 by @zstanecic in https://github.com/RHVoice/RHVoice/pull/1038
* Hardening.cmake: allow overwriting HARDENING_MACRODEFS by @CyberTailor in https://github.com/RHVoice/RHVoice/pull/847
* Fastlane metadata: cs and de i18n by @yurtpage in https://github.com/RHVoice/RHVoice/pull/1012
* Romanian source code by @zstanecic in https://github.com/RHVoice/RHVoice/pull/1039
* New language: lb by @zstanecic in https://github.com/RHVoice/RHVoice/pull/1040

## New Contributors
* @yurtpage made their first contribution in https://github.com/RHVoice/RHVoice/pull/944

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/RHVoice/RHVoice/compare/1.18.3...1.18.4

## What's Changed
* Change of the package directory Url, version bump of android app to 1.18.3 by @zstanecic in https://github.com/RHVoice/RHVoice/pull/1031


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/RHVoice/RHVoice/compare/1.18.2...1.18.3

## What's Changed
* Java update: from 18 to 21 by @zstanecic in https://github.com/RHVoice/RHVoice/pull/1028
* Core: if there is no 16k data, don't fail, load 24k data. by @Olga-Yakovleva in https://github.com/RHVoice/RHVoice/pull/1027
* Bump from version 1.18.1 to 1.18.2 by @zstanecic in https://github.com/RHVoice/RHVoice/pull/1029


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/RHVoice/RHVoice/compare/1.18.1...1.18.2

## What's Changed
* Material 3 and edge-to-edge by @t895 in https://github.com/RHVoice/RHVoice/pull/952
* update packaging doc by @savoptik in https://github.com/RHVoice/RHVoice/pull/898
* Bump github/codeql-action from 2 to 3 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/RHVoice/RHVoice/pull/958
* Bump gradle/wrapper-validation-action from 2 to 3 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/RHVoice/RHVoice/pull/959
* Fix for the python version used by codeQl by @zstanecic in https://github.com/RHVoice/RHVoice/pull/962
* Update for Spanish by @rmcpantoja in https://github.com/RHVoice/RHVoice/pull/964
* Hungarian translation for the android app by @zstanecic in https://github.com/RHVoice/RHVoice/pull/965
* voice-building-utils: several improvements by @rmcpantoja in https://github.com/RHVoice/RHVoice/pull/966
* NVDA addon: version bump for the NVDA addon store, stable channel by @zstanecic in https://github.com/RHVoice/RHVoice/pull/967
* Belarusian - Be by @zstanecic in https://github.com/RHVoice/RHVoice/pull/977
* License statement fix in the readme of Dasha-Blr by @zstanecic in https://github.com/RHVoice/RHVoice/pull/978
* SSML: Add time attribute to break element by @beqabeqa473 in https://github.com/RHVoice/RHVoice/pull/994
* Add 64 bit support for NVDA >= 2026.1 by @beqabeqa473 in https://github.com/RHVoice/RHVoice/pull/995
* Bump actions/upload-artifact from 4 to 5 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/RHVoice/RHVoice/pull/997
* Bump github/codeql-action from 3 to 4 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/RHVoice/RHVoice/pull/996
* Bump actions/checkout from 3 to 5 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/RHVoice/RHVoice/pull/983
* Bump actions/setup-java from 3 to 5 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/RHVoice/RHVoice/pull/986
* Bump actions/setup-python from 4 to 6 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/RHVoice/RHVoice/pull/990
* Bump actions/checkout from 5 to 6 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/RHVoice/RHVoice/pull/999
* Compilation instructions for Windows by @zstanecic in https://github.com/RHVoice/RHVoice/pull/1001
* Add missing include for uint32_t by @sthibaul in https://github.com/RHVoice/RHVoice/pull/991
* Core: CLDR update with the last emoji data by @zstanecic in https://github.com/RHVoice/RHVoice/pull/1002
* New core features - core 1.18 by @zstanecic in https://github.com/RHVoice/RHVoice/pull/1003
* Snap version update for 1.18 by @zstanecic in https://github.com/RHVoice/RHVoice/pull/1004
* Language updates for 1.18 core by @zstanecic in https://github.com/RHVoice/RHVoice/pull/1005
* Explicitly tell scons to use new core installers by @zstanecic in https://github.com/RHVoice/RHVoice/pull/1007
* This PR registers a handler for the SSML <lang> element so that SSML documents containing <lang> are parsed instead of being silently ignored or rejected. by @IhorShevchuk in https://github.com/RHVoice/RHVoice/pull/1008
* Ukrainian: dictionary update with fixes` by @zstanecic in https://github.com/RHVoice/RHVoice/pull/1009
* Patch version bump by @zstanecic in https://github.com/RHVoice/RHVoice/pull/1006
* Core version bump from 1.18.0 to 1.18.1 with new Msi by @zstanecic in https://github.com/RHVoice/RHVoice/pull/1013
* Last minute fixes to slovak and reorganization by @zstanecic in https://github.com/RHVoice/RHVoice/pull/1014
* Latest source code changes for croatian and serbianCroatian and serbian: latest source code changes by @zstanecic in https://github.com/RHVoice/RHVoice/pull/1015
* Spanish: important fixes and refactors. by @rmcpantoja in https://github.com/RHVoice/RHVoice/pull/1016
* Msi for spamish 1.40 for the core by @zstanecic in https://github.com/RHVoice/RHVoice/pull/1017
* Fixes to czech language support and Czech Zdenek voice by @zstanecic in https://github.com/RHVoice/RHVoice/pull/1018
* Dragana: fixes to the voice for all platformsDragana voice: fixed long loading of the voice, retrained on more ali… by @zstanecic in https://github.com/RHVoice/RHVoice/pull/1019
* Belarusian translation for android by @zstanecic in https://github.com/RHVoice/RHVoice/pull/1020
* New voices for croatian, english and Russian - Belarus by @zstanecic in https://github.com/RHVoice/RHVoice/pull/1021
* Polish: source code moved to submodule for better maintainability and organization by @zstanecic in https://github.com/RHVoice/RHVoice/pull/1022
* Russian: New update of the seva voice by @zstanecic in https://github.com/RHVoice/RHVoice/pull/1023

## New Contributors
* @t895 made their first contribution in https://github.com/RHVoice/RHVoice/pull/952
* @sthibaul made their first contribution in https://github.com/RHVoice/RHVoice/pull/991
* @IhorShevchuk made their first contribution in https://github.com/RHVoice/RHVoice/pull/1008

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/RHVoice/RHVoice/compare/1.16.5...1.18.1

## What's Changed

* Fix NVDA driver availability without installed voices by @kvark128 in https://github.com/RHVoice/RHVoice/pull/443
* add Polish voice by @grzezlo in https://github.com/RHVoice/RHVoice/pull/445
* Warn about the need to install voices in the NVDA addon by @kvark128 in https://github.com/RHVoice/RHVoice/pull/446
* A build on Linux shouldn't fail without Speech Dispatcher. by @Olga-Yakovleva in https://github.com/RHVoice/RHVoice/pull/454
* mgc with world by @Olga-Yakovleva in https://github.com/RHVoice/RHVoice/pull/459
* voice-building-utils correction and convert-audio to py3 migration. by @grzezlo in https://github.com/RHVoice/RHVoice/pull/460
* Partially parallel context clustering. by @Olga-Yakovleva in https://github.com/RHVoice/RHVoice/pull/465
* Core: handle binary feature flags in the syllabification output. by @Olga-Yakovleva in https://github.com/RHVoice/RHVoice/pull/466
* Voice training: support additional iterations of tree context clustering. by @Olga-Yakovleva in https://github.com/RHVoice/RHVoice/pull/467
* Update Ukrainian dictionary by @VovaMobile in https://github.com/RHVoice/RHVoice/pull/468
* SSML: support the phoneme element, only native phonemes are supported. by @Olga-Yakovleva in https://github.com/RHVoice/RHVoice/pull/469
* Voice-building-utils: save the trim positions in the original recordings. by @Olga-Yakovleva in https://github.com/RHVoice/RHVoice/pull/472
* New male polish voice: Natan by @zstanecic in https://github.com/RHVoice/RHVoice/pull/473
* NVDA addon: Move Rate Boost setting to the conventional position. by @TheQuinbox in <https://github.com/RHVoice/RHVoice/pull/490>
* Segmentation, experimental: use vad to initialize the silence model. by @Olga-Yakovleva in https://github.com/RHVoice/RHVoice/pull/491
* Voice-building-utils: the export-voice command calculates and saves the key parameter. by @Olga-Yakovleva in https://github.com/RHVoice/RHVoice/pull/500
* Core: sentence level tokenization support. by @louderpages in https://github.com/RHVoice/RHVoice/pull/501
* Native data package manager, Android-only for now. by @Olga-Yakovleva in https://github.com/RHVoice/RHVoice/pull/452
* Add script to convert text files to SSML format by @cyrmax in https://github.com/RHVoice/RHVoice/pull/504
* NVDA addon: Make RHVoice compatible with NVDA 2022.1 by @zstanecic in <https://github.com/RHVoice/RHVoice/pull/507>
* Macedonian Language Updates by @louderpages in https://github.com/RHVoice/RHVoice/pull/508
* Fixe segmentation fault (core dumped) on Georgian language by @Olga-Yakovleva in <https://github.com/RHVoice/RHVoice/pull/516>
* Improved support for the reuse of msi package files in SAPI voice installers. by @Olga-Yakovleva in https://github.com/RHVoice/RHVoice/pull/523
* cmake: Support new speech-dispatcher modules location by @living180 in https://github.com/RHVoice/RHVoice/pull/535
* RHVoice-test: don't ignore the quality setting in the configuration file. by @Olga-Yakovleva in https://github.com/RHVoice/RHVoice/pull/538
* NVDA addon: correct the project website url. by @Olga-Yakovleva in https://github.com/RHVoice/RHVoice/pull/539

## New Contributors
* @savoptik made their first contribution in https://github.com/RHVoice/RHVoice/pull/429
* @kvark128 made their first contribution in https://github.com/RHVoice/RHVoice/pull/443
* @TheQuinbox made their first contribution in https://github.com/RHVoice/RHVoice/pull/490
* @louderpages made their first contribution in https://github.com/RHVoice/RHVoice/pull/501
* @cyrmax made their first contribution in https://github.com/RHVoice/RHVoice/pull/504
* @gerazov made their first contribution in https://github.com/RHVoice/RHVoice/pull/534
* @living180 made their first contribution in https://github.com/RHVoice/RHVoice/pull/535

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/RHVoice/RHVoice/compare/1.6.0...1.8.0

* Albanian language 
* Voices: add tatiana (#386)
* Voices: add Mikhail 
* Voices: add Marianna (#400)
* Voices: add lyubov (#412)
* Voices: add Vitaliy
* Voices: add Albanian voice, Hana, North Macedonian accent 
* Update emoji data to version 40 
* Android: Clean up and update dependencies. 
* Android: fix the version display if there are no voices installed. 
* Android: users can now select a dictionary file on their device and import it into the app. 
* Android: don't create an initial version of the config file. 
* Android: the option to import a config file. 
* Android: target Android 11. 
* Android: fix a crash. 
* Android: correct some translations. 
* Core: a language developer may set custom flags on segments in post-g2p and use them in their hts labels. 
* Core: g2p.case setting. 
* Core: word_break feature. 
* Core: more hts features. 
* Core: data-only languages. 
* Core: data-only languages get their list of graphemes from a file. 
* Core: voices may provide equalization filters.
  * Use a cascade of biquad filters.
  * Save the coefficients in 24000/eq.txt.
  * First line is a header with the version number. In case I decide to change the format.
  * Then coefficients separated by whitespace.
  * For each filter: b0, b1, b2, a0, a1, a2.
* Core: enable the limitter if equalization is used by the voice. 
* Core: general support for a simple "accented" decision tree. 
* Core: Failing to load the eq shouldn't cause the voice loading to fail. 
* Core: support comments in eq.txt. 
* Core: if the name of a phone starts with /, remove the / after syllabification. 
* Thvoice-transcribe-sentences: the -v option now also prints out gpos if not content. 
* Brazilian Portuguese: fix the pronunciation of the word backup. 
* Brazilian Portuguese: pronunciation of the ordinal indicator characters. 
* update Ukrainian dictionary 
* honor 'SOURCE_DATE_EPOCH' environment variable if it's set.
  this helps rhvoice build reproducibility.
